nonGoals: Do not modify partitionByLanguage or any other function in card.go
Do not modify the Card struct definition
Do not change the N/A rendering logic or gradeEmoji fallback
Do not add new report output formats
objective: Guard GenerateCard's records loop to skip unsupported-language records and use a counted denominator for aggregate calculations
planText: In GenerateCard(), add a `counted` variable initialized to 0 before the records loop. At the top of the loop body, add the guard `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }`. Immediately after the guard, increment `counted`. Replace every use of `len(records)` as a denominator for aggregate rates/scores with `counted` — specifically for TotalUnits, OverallScore, and PassRate calculations. Set `card.AnalyzableUnits = counted`. Do NOT modify partitionByLanguage, any other function in card.go, or the Card struct definition. The analysis import is already present — do not add it again.

nonGoals: Do not modify any other function in health.go
Do not change the Health struct definition
Do not modify scorer.go, pipeline.go, or domain types
Do not add new report output formats
objective: Guard Health's records loop to skip unsupported-language records and use a counted denominator for pass-rate and average-score
planText: Add the import `"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis"` to the import block. In Health(), add a `counted` variable initialized to 0 before the `for _, r := range records` loop. At the top of the loop body, add the guard `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }`. Immediately after the guard, increment `counted`. Set `h.TotalUnits = counted` instead of `len(records)`. Replace `len(records)` with `counted` in the PassRate and AverageScore denominator calculations. Do NOT modify any other function in health.go.

nonGoals: Do not modify Detailed() or any other function in detailed.go
Do not change return types or function signatures
Do not add a counted denominator — per-dimension/per-language counts handle exclusion naturally
Do not modify scorer.go, pipeline.go, or domain types
objective: Guard computeDimensionAverages and computeLanguageBreakdowns loops to skip unsupported-language records
planText: Add the import `"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis"` to the import block. In computeDimensionAverages(), at the top of the `for _, r := range records` loop body, add the guard `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` before any dimension summing or count incrementing. In computeLanguageBreakdowns(), add the same guard at the top of the records loop before any per-language accumulation. No counted denominator variable is needed — the per-dimension and per-language counts naturally exclude unsupported records. Do NOT modify any other function in detailed.go.

nonGoals: Do not modify GenerateFullReport() or any other function in full.go
Do not change return types or function signatures
Do not add a counted denominator — per-language counts handle exclusion naturally
Do not modify scorer.go, pipeline.go, or domain types
Do not add new report output formats
objective: Guard buildLanguageDetail's records loop to skip unsupported-language records
planText: Add the import `"github.com/iksnae/code-certification/internal/analysis"` to the import block. In buildLanguageDetail(), at the top of the records loop body, add the guard `if analysis.ForLanguage(r.UnitID.Language()) == nil { continue }` before any per-language sum or count computation. No counted denominator variable is needed — per-language counts naturally exclude unsupported records. Do NOT modify GenerateFullReport() or any other function in full.go.
